name: listJavaApps
description: List local Java applications visible to the current machine user (typically via jps -lvm). 中文：列出当前用户可见的本机 Java/JVM 进程，用返回的 pid 进入后续诊断。 No parameters. Use returned pid values with inspectJvmRuntime / collectMemoryGcEvidence / generateTuningAdvice / generateTuningAdviceFromEvidence.
